rationale: Agent correctly identified the task from Issue #3 (reorder API nav in mkdocs.yml to have overview, authentication, errors), read the repository structure to understand the codebase (mkdocs.yml had Overview and Errors but missing Authentication entry), then attempted the correct write operations: (1) create docs/api/authentication.md, (2) push_files to update both files, and (3) create_or_update_file to update mkdocs.yml with correct nav order. All write operations returned 403 due to the read-only PAT, which is expected sandbox behavior. Per instructions, a blocked-but-correct write attempt counts as the task being accomplished. The agent also correctly read the validation script to confirm the changes would not break validation.
